roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOTION FOR FORMAL BAIL HRG AND ORDER RELEASING DEF FILED
DEFT'S MOTION FOR A CONTINUANCE OF PRELIMINARY HEARING FILED

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X:THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE REQUEST TO RELEASE DEFENDANT OUT OF CUSTODY AS FOLLOWS:/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 01-18-19/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/MO GRTD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BYTHE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THENEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 01-02-19/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 12-02-13/987,2/OR/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 10-16-13/DOP/SA1:BETH HAILES/SAORD3/SAORD/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/MO PC 1385:WITNESS UNAVAILABILITY/CTORD:THE GPS ELECTRONIC DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X: CASE TO PROCEED IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/BAIL: 75,000/
